From the Congressional Record Online through the Government Publishing Office [www.gpo.gov]




                         DISCHARGE PETITIONS--
                       ADDITIONS AND WITHDRAWALS

  The following Members added their names to the following discharge 
petitions:

       Petition 14 by Mr. MORELLE on House Resolution 982: Mr. 
     Davis of North Carolina.
       Petition 18 by Mr. SOTO on House Resolution 1046: Mr. 
     Himes.
       Petition 19 by Mr, NORCROSS on House Resolution 1140: Ms. 
     Wilson of Florida, Mr. Bacon, Mr. Moore of West Virginia, and 
     Mr. LaLota.
